institution.name: Cape Girardeau Career and Technology Center

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Cape Girardeau Career and Technology Center fell 33% between 2021 and 2024 (239 → 159).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Cape Girardeau Career and Technology Center fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Cape Girardeau Career and Technology Center rose 11% between 2006 and 2009 (70.4% → 78.1%).
